meaning: n.国籍,国家,部落,民族,民族性
examples: Asked his nationality, he said American.
All applicants will be considered regardless of age, sex, religion or nationality.
"For us", he said, "every man and woman of French nationality is French."
After decades of an open-door policy, the 1924 U.S. Immigration Act imposed quotas by nationality.
His main reason was that, with his sort of itinerary, American nationality quickly becomes a liability.
